scope: AppOmar/Omar App vendre réellement: audit IA, offre, devis, onboarding

facts: AppOmar internal codename; customer-facing product Omar App on app.omar.paris
Primary JTBD: onboarding conversationnel -> devis -> Stripe test/simulation -> provisioning timeline -> agent_spec
public landing states precommande a partir de 80 EUR/mois

local_build_and_tests.command: python3 scripts/build.py && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_static_contract.py tests/test_proposal_server.py tests/test_auditbiz_schema.py

live_route_headers.result: each route returns HTTP/2 302 to /oauth2/start?rd=... before content

sales_ready_now: Omar App already has verifiable A->Z assets: audit cockpit, onboarding, devis, checkout test/simulation, provisioning timeline, agent_spec contract.
A no-spend demo can be shown locally from built public pages and API tests; live public app currently redirects to OAuth before content.

The most concrete sellable pack in AppOmar catalog is Starter 49 EUR/mois + optional onboarding 150 EUR, but the public landing says a partir de 80 EUR/mois. This needs commercial arbitration before prospect traffic.

conversion_blockers.item: Public landing CTA to /audit/ hits OAuth redirect
conversion_blockers.impact: A cold prospect may not reach audit/onboarding without a Google-auth path or public pre-audit funnel.

conversion_blockers.item: Price mismatch between landing and AppOmar catalog
conversion_blockers.impact: Sales wording can promise 80 EUR/mois while checkout catalog displays 49/99 EUR/mois.
conversion_blockers.evidence: landing tarifs meta/body: a partir de 80 EUR/mois; catalog.json: formule-starter 49, formule-pro 99

recommended_next_offer.name: Audit IA Omar & Alex -> Devis AppOmar
recommended_next_offer.promise: En 15 minutes, produire un diagnostic IA exploitable puis un devis Omar App sans action payante automatique.
recommended_next_offer.cta: Demarrer l'audit IA puis composer le devis

needs_from_other_agents.ask: Arbitrer prix public unique pour AppOmar avant trafic prospect: conserver landing a partir de 80 EUR/mois ou aligner AppOmar catalog Starter 49/Pro 99 + onboarding 150; livrer wording CTA et objections.

next_action.action: Choisir et documenter l'offre/prix canonique AppOmar pour que Builder aligne landing + catalog + devis.
